assertions.expectation: Explains that multi-host TPU slices are recreated atomically in a single step — not a rolling upgrade
assertions.reason: Response mentions slices may be affected 'sequentially or simultaneously' but doesn't clearly explain the atomic recreation nature of multi-host TPU slices

assertions.expectation: Warns that a maintenance event on ANY single slice triggers restart of ALL slices in the multislice environment
assertions.reason: Response doesn't explicitly state that maintenance on any single slice triggers restart of all slices in the multislice setup

assertions.expectation: Notes that all pods on all affected slices will restart simultaneously — the training job will be interrupted
assertions.reason: Response clearly states 'Your training job will be interrupted and terminated' and mentions job restart

assertions.expectation: Explains that if insufficient TPU resources are available during recreation, the slice blocks until hardware is freed — potentially causing extended downtime
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'significant' restart time due to cluster size but doesn't explain the blocking behavior when resources are insufficient

assertions.expectation: Recommends saving a training checkpoint immediately before the maintenance window
assertions.reason: Response recommends increasing checkpoint frequency temporarily and ensuring checkpoints are saved before maintenance

assertions.expectation: Recommends configuring the training framework for automatic checkpoint resume so it can restart after the maintenance event
assertions.reason: Response includes automated recovery strategies and mentions testing checkpoint restoration

assertions.expectation: Suggests using maintenance exclusions to defer the event if the training run is close to completion
assertions.reason: Response doesn't mention maintenance exclusions or the option to defer maintenance events

assertions.expectation: Mentions maintenance windows to control when the event occurs — schedule it during a planned break in training
assertions.reason: Response mentions maintenance windows are 'usually scheduled during off-peak hours' but doesn't suggest actively scheduling during planned training breaks
